title: Update color scheme to violet/black with pink background and yellow grids

requirements.text: Update the global CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css to use a violet and black color combo: set the primary/accent colors to violet tones, set the main background color to pink, and update the grid background utility colors to yellow. Ensure both light and dark theme tokens reflect this new palette consistently.

quotes: cahnge the colour to violet and black combo with pink background and yellow coloyr grids

acceptanceCriteria: Primary/accent CSS tokens are violet (e.g., oklch values in the violet range)
Grid background utility (defined in index.css) renders yellow grid lines
Black is used for text/foreground contrast tokens
All existing pages and components visually reflect the new palette without layout breakage

requirements.text: Update frontend/tailwind.config.js color tokens to align with the new violet/black/pink/yellow palette, ensuring Tailwind utility classes used across components (badges, cards, buttons, year badges, navigation) pick up the updated theme colors.

quotes: cahnge the colour to violet and black combo with pink background and yellow coloyr grids

acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind config color tokens for primary, background, accent, and grid reference the new violet/pink/yellow/black values
Year badges, nav links, and card components display the updated colors
No hardcoded color classes conflict with the new palette

requirements.text: Update the SparkParticles component (frontend/src/components/SparkParticles.tsx) to use the new violet/pink/yellow color schemes for the floating pill particles instead of the existing warm brown/skin-tone schemes.

quotes: cahnge the colour to violet and black combo with pink background and yellow coloyr grids

acceptanceCriteria: Floating pill particles use violet, pink, and yellow color variants
No warm brown or skin-tone colors remain in the particle animation

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not change any backend logic or data models
Do not alter layout structure or component functionality — only colors
nonGoals: Changing typography or font configuration beyond what is needed for color contrast
